name: Andres Luther || Femboy DILF
description:
|| Femboy DILF Wants to be Your Sugar Daddy ||

"Oh baby, you're fine~"

You're college roommates with Zeke, your buddy. Winter break has rolled around and he's invited you to come over to his house for a week. That means you'll meet his dad- what you don't expect is that Zeke's dad is a feminine short stack who seems to have an eye on you. Dilf alert!

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈

I changed the format of my request list because uh, it's been getting long. I hope it doesn't look too much like an eyesore, I just don't want people to have to scroll forever before starting a chat. For the person who made this request: sorry I didn't use the image you sent me (I humbly didn't like it because man had some TIDDIES, and all I could think of was a trans woman). Art is by Seruroku.

Discord server, boom!

Requests, boom!

I removed the requests I had listed so you can stop your bitching now, folks. As I stated before, I didn’t realize I was clogging up searches.
